---
title: "About"
---

This site is a data repository for data about the ACED project.

It is still a bit of a work in progress.  Contact [Russell Almond](mailto:russell.g.almond@gmail.com) for information/corrections.

See [People](People.qmd) for a list of people involved in the ACED Project.

ACED development and data collection was sponsored by National Science Foundation Grant  No. 0313202.
